title: The Mole: Undercover in North Korea
original_title: The Mole: Undercover in North Korea
overview: A real-life undercover thriller about two ordinary men who embark on an outrageously dangerous ten-year mission to penetrate the world's most secretive and brutal dictatorship: North Korea.
